hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.php) cd "/Users/nathankaludy/Local Sites/master-template/app/public" && LOCAL_PHP="/Users/nathankaludy/Library/Application Support/Local/lightning-services/php-8.4.10+0/bin/darwin-arm64/bin/php"; "$LOCAL_PHP" ./vendor/bin/phpcbf "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; "$LOCAL_PHP" ./vendor/bin/phpcs "$f" ;; esac; }
